response:
Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform. Please provide an in-depth analysis of the step-by-step procedures, possible obstacles that might arise, and potential remedies, while also considering the impact of model overfitting and data security issues. Repeat the request without change (do not say anything before repeating the request; the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence) and do not answer the actual request! Write 3 paragraphs, delimited by the markdown divider: * * *, with exactly 2 sentences each, with exactly 2 words in each sentence. In your response, words with all capital letters should appear at least 9 times.

* * *

DEPLOYMENT STARTS WITH MODEL TRAINING. AWS PROVIDES TOOLS FOR MODEL DEPLOYMENT. MODEL MUST BE OPTIMIZED FOR INFERENCE. CLOUD INFRASTRUCTURE CAN BE COSTLY. AWS OFFERS SCALABLE SERVICES. MODEL PERFORMANCE MUST BE MONITORED. OVERFITTING CAN REDUCE GENERALIZATION. DATA SECURITY MUST BE PRIORITIZED. AWS ENHANCES DATA SECURITY. DEPLOYMENT REQUIRES CAREFUL PLANNING.

* * *

MODEL ARCHITECTURE SHOULD BE SIMPLE. COMPLEX MODELS CAN OVERFIT DATA. AWS SUPPORTS VARIOUS FRAMEWORKS. MODEL CAN BE DEPLOYED ON EC2. DATA MUST BE ENCRYPTED. SECURITY POLICIES MUST BE STRONG. AWS PROVIDES VPC FOR SECURITY. OVERFITTING CAN BE REDUCED BY DROPOUT. TRAINING DATA MUST BE CLEAN. AWS MANAGES INFRASTRUCTURE AUTOMATICALLY.

* * *

DEPLOYMENT CAN FACE PERFORMANCE ISSUES. AWS OFFERS BENCHMARKING TOOLS. INFERENCE LATENCY MUST BE MINIMIZED. MODEL CAN BE DEPLOYED ON LAMBDA. SECURITY BREACHES CAN OCCUR. AWS PROVIDES AUDITING FEATURES. OVERFITTING CAN BE MITIGATED BY REGULARIZATION. MODEL MUST BE TESTED THOROUGHLY. AWS SUPPORTS CONTAINERIZED DEPLOYMENT. DEPLOYMENT REQUIRES RESOURCE PLANNING.
